_comment: Benchmark prompts for ADR-0005 empirical validation. Edit the entries below with prompts representative of YOUR product domain before the final smoke run. The default set covers a generic spread of motion patterns, subjects, and visual styles to surface failure modes early. Order is significant: t2v prompts are batched first to avoid model swap cost between t2v and i2v pipelines (the handler unloads on mode switch).

_runner_contract.label: stable identifier; appears in filenames and metrics
_runner_contract.negative_prompt: optional; falls back to handler default if omitted
_runner_contract.input_image: i2v only; path RELATIVE to spike/ directory (e.g. test_images/portrait.jpg)
_runner_contract.seed: optional integer; if omitted, handler picks a random seed and reports it

prompts.label: t2v-01-landscape-static
prompts.prompt: A serene mountain lake at golden hour, mist rising slowly from the water, gentle wind moving the pine trees on the shore, cinematic establishing shot

prompts.label: t2v-02-single-subject-walk
prompts.prompt: A woman in a red coat walks down a quiet Parisian street in late afternoon, soft warm light, shallow depth of field, tracking shot from behind

prompts.label: t2v-03-dynamic-action
prompts.prompt: A skateboarder performs a kickflip in slow motion at an urban skatepark at sunset, dust kicked up, dramatic backlight, side angle

prompts.label: t2v-04-animal-motion
prompts.prompt: A golden retriever runs through a field of yellow wildflowers under a clear blue sky, camera tracks alongside the dog at low angle, joyful and playful mood

prompts.label: t2v-05-stylized-night
prompts.prompt: A neon-lit cyberpunk street at night, light rain on wet pavement reflecting pink and cyan signs, slow crane shot rising above the crowd, anamorphic flare

prompts.label: i2v-01-portrait-smile
prompts.prompt: The subject slowly smiles and turns their gaze toward the camera, soft natural light, subtle head movement, shallow depth of field

prompts.label: i2v-02-landscape-atmosphere
prompts.prompt: Wind moves through the grass and trees, clouds drift slowly across the sky, gentle ambient motion, photorealistic

prompts.label: i2v-03-product-reveal
prompts.prompt: Slow camera orbit around the product, soft studio lighting, product remains the focal point, premium commercial style

prompts.label: i2v-04-action-continuation
prompts.prompt: Camera zooms in slowly while the subject continues their action with natural fluid motion, motion blur on hands, cinematic

prompts.label: i2v-05-abstract-particles
prompts.prompt: Particles drift and swirl through the scene, ethereal atmosphere, soft glowing light moving slowly, dreamlike
